message:
feat(api): add deps, doctor, and config endpoints

Add new REST API routes for server introspection and configuration:
- GET /v1/deps - retrieve dependency information
- GET /v1/doctor - run health diagnostics
- GET /v1/config - retrieve current configuration (read permission)
- PATCH /v1/config - update configuration (system config permission)

All endpoints protected with appropriate permission middleware.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
